_comment: Tunable pillar weights. Seeded 2026-05-16 from mundo_daily_post _PILLAR_WEIGHTS (2026-05-13 rebalance). mundo_optimize.py adjusts these each cycle within guardrails (±1/run, floor 1, ceil 6, n>=3, EWMA-smoothed). scout_report/narrative_critique frozen at 0 (m/agents killed per scoring memory) — optimizer never raises them. daily_post.py loads this with the hardcoded dict as fallback.
